display.purpose: Large metric numbers and dedicated permission-flow focal points.

title.purpose: Strong panel names and brand header labels.

label.purpose: Buttons, list item names, and primary row text.

caption.purpose: Metadata, timestamps, and quiet helper text.

section-label.purpose: Uppercase navigation and dashboard group labels.

mono-data.purpose: Aligned file sizes, costs, scores, and percentages.

mono-path.purpose: Filesystem paths, commands, and code-like fragments.

motion.name: sidebar-state
motion.purpose: Fast hover and selection feedback in navigation.

motion.name: gauge-update
motion.purpose: Health gauge arc and numeric score changes.

breakpoints.name: compact-panel
breakpoints.purpose: Dashboard metric strip adapts without resizing text.

breakpoints.name: integration-grid
breakpoints.purpose: Integration cards split or stack depending on window width.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button for scans, opens, and confirmations.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2582F4; color: #EDF0F3; border: 0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 16px; font: 500 13px/1.25 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 120ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #5BA3F7; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2582F4; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #1B70E0; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral action for refresh, cancel, reveal, and low-risk operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #272A30; color: #EDF0F3; border: 1px solid #FFFFFF21; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 16px; font: 500 13px/1.25 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 120ms ease-out, border-color 120ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #2E3138; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2582F4; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background: #202228; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive confirmation button for permanent delete and revocation.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: #C62F2F; color: #EDF0F3; border: 0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 16px; font: 500 13px/1.25 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 120ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #D96B6B; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2582F4; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-danger:active { background: #A92A2A; }

components.name: Evidence Chip
components.description: Compact metadata pill for scan evidence and recommendation context.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 999px; background: #272A30; color: #9BA4B0; border: 1px solid #FFFFFF0A; padding: 4px 12px; font: 400 11px/1.3 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: Flat bordered surface for dashboard panels and settings groups.
components.html:
SYSTEM SNAPSHOT
176 GB free

750 / 926 GB used
components.css: .ds-card { background: #191B1F; color: #EDF0F3; border: 1px solid #FFFFFF12; border-radius: 6px; padding: 16px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-label { color: #464A53; font: 600 10px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.8px; } .ds-card-value { margin-top: 12px; color: #EDF0F3; font: 600 20px/1.25 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card p { margin: 8px 0 0; color: #67707E; font: 400 11px/1.3 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Sidebar Item
components.description: Active navigation row with the leading Hawking Blue capsule.
components.css: .ds-sidebar-item { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 184px; background: #202228; color: #EDF0F3; border: 1px solid #FFFFFF21; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 16px; font: 500 13px/1.25 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; text-align: left; } .ds-sidebar-active { position: absolute; left: 6px; width: 3px; height: 22px; border-radius: 999px; background: #2582F4; } .ds-sidebar-icon { width: 20px; color: #EDF0F3; text-align: center; } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: #191B1F; } .ds-sidebar-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2582F4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Scan Row
components.description: Dense cleanup evidence row with confidence bars, path, size, and safety tint.
components.css: .ds-scan-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: rgba(59, 155, 104, 0.12); color: #EDF0F3; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-bars { display: inline-flex; align-items: end; gap: 1.5px; width: 24px; height: 24px; } .ds-bars i { display: block; width: 3px; border-radius: 1px; background: #3B9B68; } .ds-bars i:nth-child(1) { height: 6px; } .ds-bars i:nth-child(2) { height: 9.5px; } .ds-bars i:nth-child(3) { height: 13px; } .ds-bars i:nth-child(4) { height: 16.5px; } .ds-bars i:nth-child(5) { height: 20px; } .ds-checkbox { display: inline-grid; place-items: center; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 3px; background: #3B9B68; color: #EDF0F3; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-copy { display: grid; gap: 2px; min-width: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-copy strong { font: 500 13px/1.25 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-copy em { color: #67707E; font: 400 11px/1.25 SFMono-Regular, ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; font-style: normal; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-size { color: #EDF0F3; font: 400 12px/1.25 SFMono-Regular, ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Segmented Control
components.description: Dark-mode-safe replacement for native segmented controls when contrast collapses.
components.css: .ds-segmented { display: inline-flex; gap: 2px; padding: 2px; border-radius: 6px; background: #191B1F; } .ds-segmented button { min-width: 92px; border: 0; border-radius: 4px; background: #202228; color: #9BA4B0; padding: 8px 12px; font: 500 13px/1.25 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-segmented button.is-selected { background: #2582F4; color: #EDF0F3; } .ds-segmented button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2582F4; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Gargantua is a dark, precise product interface for developer Mac owners who want to clear accumulated build artifacts, caches, duplicates, and model debris without second-guessing the tool. The interface should feel like a space-cold terminal that grew up: dense, file-literate, and calm under pressure. Trust is the visual product. Color is classification first and decoration never. Warm safety signals are rare against a cold void; blue is reserved for direct interactivity and focus. Surfaces pull attention inward through borders, tonal contrast, and compact hierarchy, not glow.
keyCharacteristics: Dark mode primary, tuned for developers working between coding sessions.
Restrained color, one interaction accent, warm safety states, no decorative palette.
Dense information with strong hierarchy: paths, sizes, confidence, and safety stay visible.
System fonts for UI, monospaced type for paths and byte counts.
Borders and tonal layers only. No shadows, no glass, no glow.

rules.name: The Classification Rule
rules.body: Safe, review, and protected colors belong only to safety classification, system state, or cleanup risk. They are prohibited as decoration.

rules.name: The Blue Means Click Rule
rules.body: Hawking Blue means direct interaction, focus, or current selection. Do not use it for static illustration.

rules.name: The Void Holds Still Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds stay in the neutral stack. Do not introduce purple gradients, beige warmth, neon glows, or glass tints.

rules.name: The Path Precision Rule
rules.body: Paths and sizes always use monospace. Do not set file paths in the body font.

rules.name: The No Display Labels Rule
rules.body: UI labels, buttons, rows, and settings text stay compact. Display scale is reserved for metrics and dedicated hero-like permission moments.

rules.name: The No Point Light Rule
rules.body: Shadows are forbidden as the default elevation language. In this product, surfaces separate by tone, border, and placement.

rules.name: The Border Is Evidence Rule
rules.body: Borders confirm structure. Use standard Border for containers, Border Soft for internal dividers, Border Em for active control outlines, and Border Focus for keyboard focus.

dos: Do use Void, Surface 1, Surface 2, Surface 3, and Surface 4 as the complete depth ladder.
Do reserve Hawking Blue for actions, links, focus, and current selection.
Do keep safety colors tied to the Trust Layer: safe, review, protected.
Do show file paths, sizes, confidence, and safety together when cleanup decisions are being made.
Do use SF Symbols for tool and navigation icons, aligned to fixed-size icon slots.
Do use 4px spacing increments and compact radii. Density is allowed when hierarchy is clear.
Do make empty and loading states quiet, useful, and native.
donts: Don't use CleanMyMac X marketing polish, oversized lifestyle hero sections, or subscription-cleaner gloss.
Don't use generic dashboard templates with equal-weight metric cards and decorative charts.
Don't use glassmorphism, blur panels, frosted cards, or translucent decoration.
Don't use neon-on-dark AI aesthetic, purple-blue gradients, glowing outlines, or bokeh backgrounds.
Don't use shadows as elevation. Borders and tonal layers are the system.
Don't use safety colors for decoration, badges without risk meaning, or arbitrary category color.
Don't hide paths or byte counts behind hover. Evidence must be visible when trust decisions happen.
Don't make cards inside cards. Group with sections, dividers, and full-width bands instead.
